rows.quote: lokaśāstrayor iti vākyaśeṣaḥ
ātmā dharmāś copacaryanta ity ātmadharmopacāraḥ sa punar ātmaprajñaptir dharmaprajñaptiś c
yac ca yatra nāsti tat tatropacaryate tad yathā bāhīke gauḥ evaṃ vijñānasvarūpe bahiś cātm
vividha ity anekaprakāraḥ
ātmā jīvo jantur manujo māṇava ity evamādika ātmopacāraḥ skandhā dhātava āyatanāni rūpaṃ v
ayaṃ dviprakāro 'py upacāro vijñānapariṇāma eva na mukhye ātmani dharmeṣu ceti
vijñānapariṇāme 'sau ātmadharmopacāra iti saṃbadhyate
ayaṃ dviprakāro 'py upacāro vijñānapariṇāma eva na mukhye ātmani dharmeṣu ceti kuta etat d
upacārasya ca nirādhārasyāsaṃbhavād avaśyaṃ vijñānapariṇāmo vastuto 'stīty upagantavyo yat
ko 'yaṃ pariṇāmo nāma anyathātvam kāraṇakṣaṇanirodhasamakālaḥ kāraṇakṣaṇavilakṣaṇaḥ kāryas
evañ ca sarvaṃ vijñeyaṃ parikalpitasvabhāvatvād vastuto na vidyate vijñānaṃ punaḥ pratītya
vijñānapariṇāmaḥ kati prabheda iti na jñāyate atas tatprabhedopadarśanārtham āha pariṇāmaḥ
yatrātmādyupacāro dharmopacāraś ca sa punar hetubhāvena phalabhāvena ca bhidyate
yo 'sau trividhaḥ pariṇāma ukto 'sāv api na jñāyate
anyas tv āha asaty ātmani mukhye dharmeṣu copacāro na yujyate
tatra yad uktaṃ asaty ātmani mukhye dharmeṣu copacāro na yukta iti tad ayuktam
sa eṣa trividhaḥ pariṇāmo vipākākhyo mananākhyo viṣayavijñaptyākhyaś ca
